settings.title: Make It Forever
settings.description:
This Valentine’s Day, Saturday 14 February, we’re marking love with moments designed to last.

Join us in-store for a complimentary tattoo experience with @wayfarerstradingco, no purchase required.

Available at our Avalon & Paddington showrooms.

Customers will select their design from a curated flash sheet available on the day.

15% off fine jewellery, available in-store only during the event. Exclusive gift bags for the first 10 customers at each location.

Important Details:

  1. Tattoos are offered on a first in, best dressed basis and subject to artist availability.
  2. One tattoo per customer.
  3. Gift bags are limited to the first 10 customers per location.

Follow us on Instagram for an update on event timing and flash previews.
